title: Hydra repos config
description: Repos Hydra is allowed to poll. Read by the pickup loop; the operator owns this file. See CLAUDE.md 'Operating loop' step 3.

local_path.description: Absolute path to the local clone.

git_url.description: Optional override. Default: https://github.com/<owner>/<name>.git. Used by scripts/ensure-repo-cloned.sh on cloud commanders. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-cloud-repo-clone.md.

cloud_local_path.description: Optional override for the cloud-side clone path. Default: /hydra/data/repos/<owner>/<name>. Cloud-only — local commanders keep using local_path. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-cloud-repo-clone.md.

merge_policy.description: Optional override. Absent = defer to global policy.md.

preferred_backend.description: Which worker backend commander spawns for this repo. 'claude' (default when absent) = worker-implementation. 'codex' = worker-codex-implementation (requires a working codex CLI in the runtime env; see docs/phase2-vps-runbook.md 'Configuring the Codex backend'). 'auto' = future rate-limit-aware routing, currently treated as 'claude' until ticket #97 lands. Additive / optional — absent means 'claude'. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-codex-worker-backend.md.
